10.reason: [The adjacency list is not sorted properly before DFS traversal, and the loop iterates over fixed 100 entries instead of only valid neighbors. This may cause visiting vertices in wrong order or accessing invalid data.]

21.reason: [Condition should be 'front <= top' or 'front < size'; current condition allows reading beyond written elements when queue is empty but front > top.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Condition should be 'front <= top' or 'front < size'; current condition allows reading beyond written elements when queue is empty but front > top.]

78.reason: [Bubble sort implementation is incomplete; it only does one pass and doesn't guarantee full sorting of adjacency lists.]

110.reason: [Only marks deleted vertex as -1 but does not compact the adjacency list, leaving gaps that break traversal logic which assumes contiguous valid entries ending with -1.]
